name_cn:
『Burberry』
Burberry's new runway bowling bag reimagined as an exquisite crossbody. Selected smooth Italian leather combined with vintage check, decorated with brand logo embossing, and equipped with a leather-covered lock and key for security. Compact yet spacious, fits 4 phones. Model 8358, 18 x 8 x 11cm.
